focus: Security fixes — input validation, body-size limit, sensitive settings redaction

fixes.title: Add Zod validation to task, project, and tag API routes
fixes.description: Added .safeParse() calls at the API boundary for POST/PATCH handlers in tasks, projects, and tags. Created new Zod schemas (CreateProjectInput, UpdateProjectInput, CreateTagInput) in src/core/types.ts. All route handlers now validate request bodies and return 400 with structured error details on validation failure.

details.tasks.ts: POST / validates with CreateTaskInput.safeParse(); PATCH /:id validates with UpdateTaskInput.safeParse()
details.projects.ts: POST / validates with CreateProjectInput.safeParse(); PATCH /:id validates with UpdateProjectInput.safeParse()
details.types.ts: Added CreateProjectInput (name max 200, color max 50, icon max 100, viewStyle enum, isFavorite bool), UpdateProjectInput (partial), CreateTagInput (name min 1 max 100, color max 50)

fixes.title: Add global body-size limit middleware (10MB)
fixes.description: Added Hono's built-in bodyLimit middleware globally to src/server.ts with a 10MB max. This prevents memory exhaustion from oversized request bodies. The voice transcribe route already has its own 25MB limit via Content-Length checking.

fixes.title: Redact sensitive settings on GET /api/settings/:key
fixes.description: Added a SENSITIVE_KEY_PATTERNS list and isSensitiveKey() check to the settings GET endpoint. Keys containing 'api_key', 'token', 'secret', or 'password' now return '[REDACTED]' if a value exists, or null if not set. This prevents leaking AI API keys and OAuth tokens through the generic settings endpoint.

details.behavior: Returns { value: '[REDACTED]' } if value exists, { value: null } if not set

deferred.reason: Plugin sandbox is an architectural issue requiring vm module, worker_threads, or separate process isolation. Not fixable with a route-level patch.
Rate limiting requires infrastructure decisions (in-memory vs Redis, per-user vs global). Deferred as this is a localhost-first app.
SSRF IPv6 and DNS rebinding are edge cases for a localhost application. Plugin install URL checks are already present for common private ranges.

verification.typecheck: pass (pre-existing AppLayout.tsx error from separate round-2 changes; no new errors introduced)
verification.lint: pass (0 errors in changed files; 2 pre-existing errors in src/api/ai.ts from separate changes)
verification.tests: pass — 2469 tests in 202 files, all green
